visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco warehouse. A young woman with a blue beret and a cream sweater holds a three-pack of 'red seal' propolis toothpaste. Behind her are massive stacks of the same product on industrial shelving. The lighting is bright warehouse fluorescent. She smiles and gestures excitedly. (2) A close-up shot focuses on the product boxes on the shelf. The packaging is white with a red logo and yellow honey accents. The stacks are neat and extend deep into the background. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home environment with a marble-textured table. Two women are present; the one from the first scene is joined by a friend in a beige cardigan. They sit behind the table, presenting the toothpaste boxes and tubes with active hand gestures. (4) A macro shot shows the side of the toothpaste box, specifically highlighting the New Zealand silver fern certification logo. The print is crisp and the lighting is soft and even. (5) In a bathroom setting, the two women are shown brushing their teeth with white electric toothbrushes. They look into the mirror, making faces and pointing at their mouths to demonstrate usage. (6) Returning to the marble table, the women hold up individual tubes and point to their teeth and gums while smiling. The background is a blurred living room area with warm, soft lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 不用飛出國!. (2) [Variety]: 超扯. 比紐西蘭便宜. [Subtitle]: 比在紐西蘭買還要便宜的. (3) [Subtitle]: 紅印蜂膠牙膏. (4) [Slogan]: 6入649元. [Subtitle]: 6入649元. (5) [Subtitle]: 所以每一條是108元. (6) [Variety]: 大容量. [Subtitle]: 每一條有160g. (7) [Subtitle]: 紐西蘭百年天然品牌 | 護齦蜂膠牙膏 天然牙齦護理師. (8) [Subtitle]: 很多人去紐西蘭都一定要買這個回來. (9) [Subtitle]: 沒想到好市多就有. (10) [Variety]: 而且價格還超划算. [Subtitle]: 而且價格還超划算. (11) [Subtitle]: 我也要買一組. (12) [Slogan]: red seal 紅印 蜂膠牙膏. [Subtitle]: red seal 紅印 蜂膠牙膏. (13) [Subtitle]: 他主打天然草本萃取. (14) [Subtitle]: 不含氟化物 防腐劑 人工色素及香精. (15) [Subtitle]: 包裝上的葉子啊. [Logo]: NEWZEALAND.COM. (16) [Variety]: 銀蕨認證. [Subtitle]: 是紐西蘭政府給的銀蕨認證. (17) [Subtitle]: 只有達到高標準的企業才可以拿到. (18) [Subtitle]: 用來指引消費者. (19) [Subtitle]: 選擇更健康優質的產品. (20) [Variety]: 安心使用. [Subtitle]: 所以全家都可以安心的使用. (21) [Slogan]: 提升牙齦防護力. [Subtitle]: 蜂膠可以提升牙齦的防護力. (22) [Subtitle]: 如果你是敏感性牙齒. (23) [Subtitle]: 更要選用成分天然的產品. (24) [Subtitle]: 而且紐西蘭是目前世界唯一. (25) [Subtitle]: 禁用抗生素餵養蜜蜂的國家. (26) [Subtitle]: 所以相對來說它們的蜂膠會更好喔. (27) [Subtitle]: 最感動的是他們研發過程. (28) [Subtitle]: 沒有做任何動物實驗. (29) [Subtitle]: 來刷刷看. (30) [Variety]: 刷起來涼而不辣. [Subtitle]: 刷起來涼而不辣. (31) [Subtitle]: 自然的草本植萃. (32) [Subtitle]: 讓口腔清新又舒服. (33) [Subtitle]: 它有添加碳酸鈣也會. (34) [Subtitle]: 幫助牙齒潔白. (35) [Subtitle]: 泡沫細膩且紮實. (36) [Subtitle]: 可以穩穩地包覆在牙齒上. (37) [Subtitle]: 不會四處飛濺. (38) [Subtitle]: 有些人的嘴角下巴容易長痘痘. (39) [Subtitle]: 有可能是因為牙膏中的氟化物. (40) [Subtitle]: 對黏膜及肌膚產生的刺激. (41) [Subtitle]: 導致毛囊阻塞或發炎. (42) [Subtitle]: 所以選用天然的成分非常的重要. (43) [Subtitle]: 如果家裡有孕婦、小孩. (44) [Subtitle]: 在保護牙齒的同時. (45) [Subtitle]: 更要注意每天使用的牙膏成分是否天然. (46) [Subtitle]: 用一般牙膏的價格. (47) [Variety]: 享有高品質紅印蜂膠. [Subtitle]: 享有高品質紅印蜂膠. (48) [Slogan]: 留言 我愛刷牙牙齒好. [Subtitle]: 留言 我愛刷牙牙齒好. (49) [Subtitle]: 抽三個人讓你免費試用. (50) [Slogan]: 高貴不貴的紅印蜂膠!. [Subtitle]: 高貴不貴的紅印蜂膠!. (51) [Subtitle]: 跟我們一起刷刷牙.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a blue beret and white sweater; the other wears a beige cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse with industrial racks and a domestic home interior with marble tables and a bathroom.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a vibrant, high-pitched female voiceover delivering a rapid-fire introduction. The BGM is an upbeat acoustic pop track with clear guitar strumming. A sharp 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the appearance of the Costco logo. (2) As the narrator lists prices, a 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies visual transitions. The acoustic texture is clean, indicating a studio voiceover. The vocal arousal is high and positive. (3) During the brushing sequence, the BGM continues but there is a subtle foley layer of percussive friction representing the tooth brushing. The narrator's speech rate remains consistently fast and energetic. (4) The final segment maintains the upbeat musical rhythm with melodic piano accents. The voiceover concludes with an authoritative yet friendly call to action, accompanied by a soft bubble 'pop' sound effect for emphasis.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Price Comparison -> Product Benefits -> Demonstration -> Safety/Specialty Info -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the purchase of red seal propolis toothpaste at Costco Taiwan by highlighting its low price, natural ingredients, and New Zealand certification.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, price listing, and purchase location call-to-action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-energy social media promotional video utilizing warehouse visits and home testing to build trust and urgency.
